title: Hello Kitty Totem
description: A mod That Adds a custom Hello kitty totem (Animated) big update soon!
body:
🎭 **_ Features_**

- ✅ Replaces Totem of Undying with a Hello Kitty Animated Totem 🧩 Compatible with vanilla gameplay and datapacks
- 🔁 Modular asset structure for easy editing and streamer swaps
- Custom GUI **_(Soon)_**
- Custom Background **_(Soon)_**
- Custom Armor and Weapons **_(Soon)_**
- Custom End Crystals and Respawn Anchors **_(Soon)_**
- PvP Utilities **_(Soon)_**
-  🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.20+
-  Join Our [Discord](https://discord.gg/d96gFRrRRX) for Support
